taxonomy: Rubus emancipatus is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically in the family Rosaceae. This species is part of the genus Rubus, which includes several species of brambles and raspberries. The classification also places it in the order Rosales, and further in the class Magnoliopsida and the division Magnoliophyta. The leaves and fruits of Rubus emancipatus have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
